hero.title: Try Before You Buy. See How Clothes Look on You.
hero.description: Upload your photo, pick any outfit, and let AI show you exactly how it fits. No more guesswork, no more returns.

modal.title: Three simple steps to see your look
modal.description:
1. Upload a photo of yourself in form-fitting clothes.
2. Choose outfits from our library or upload your own clothes.
3. AI generates a realistic preview of you wearing the outfit.
modal.instruction: Each try-on uses 50 credits. Free users get 3 tries per day.
modal.linkHint: Sign up free to try VirtuTry today

features.title: Why VirtuTry
features.subtitle: See how clothes look on you before buying. No fitting room needed — AI previews every outfit on your body so you can shop with confidence.

aiOptimized.title: Ultra-Realistic Try-On
aiOptimized.description: AI accurately renders fabric texture, fit, and drape on your body proportions — results look like professional photography.

zeroPipeline.title: Upload Once, Try Endlessly
zeroPipeline.description: One photo of yourself unlocks unlimited outfit previews. Mix and match from the wardrobe or upload your own clothes in seconds.

nonTechnical.title: Smarter Shopping Decisions
nonTechnical.description: See the real look before you buy. Avoid ill-fitting purchases, reduce returns, and save on shipping hassles.

productionGrade.title: Privacy-First & Secure
productionGrade.description: Your photos are used only for try-on generation, encrypted in transit and at rest. Delete anytime from your history.

pricing.title: Pricing Plans
pricing.subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing — pay for what you use
pricing.description: Choose a plan that fits your shopping habits, or buy credits on demand. Each virtual try-on costs 50 credits.

values.yearlyInstallments: {credits} released each month on annual billing
values.bestForStarter: Shipping an MVP with recurring usage
values.bestForPro: Heavier production workloads and frequent generation

details.yearlyInstallments: Annual billing releases {credits} credits each month

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: For casual shoppers who want to preview outfits before buying.
features: Annual plan releases 1,000 credits each month

pro.name: Pro
pro.description: For frequent shoppers and fashion enthusiasts who need more previews.
features: Annual plan releases 10,000 credits each month
Priority generation queue for faster results
Great for fashion bloggers and power shoppers

credits.name: Credits Pack
credits.description: One-time credits you can stack on top of any plan.
features: Credits are added immediately after payment
Useful for launches, spikes, and one-off bursts

testimonials.title: What Our Users Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real people sharing how VirtuTry changed the way they shop for clothes.

items.name: Sarah Lin
items.quote: I used to return half my online orders. Now I try everything on virtually first — my return rate dropped to almost zero.

items.name: James Zhou
items.quote: Couldn't decide between three suit colors. AI showed me all three in minutes — decision made.

items.name: Alice Johnson
items.quote: As a fashion blogger, I no longer need to buy every outfit just to photograph it. VirtuTry saves me time and budget.

items.name: Emily Chen
items.quote: Trying on wedding dresses without the pressure of a fitting room — this tool was a lifesaver. The previews look incredibly real.

items.name: Daniel Park
items.quote: I have body image anxiety and hate fitting rooms. Trying on at home without anyone watching made shopping so much better.

items.name: Mia Zhao
items.quote: Finally I can pick clothes for my parents without guessing. Upload their photo and instantly see if it fits.

items.name: Eva Green
items.quote: The results are incredibly natural — even fabric wrinkles and body curves are rendered accurately.

items.name: Frank Moore
items.quote: Dead simple to use. Upload, pick an outfit, generate. The whole flow takes under a minute.

items.name: Grace Hall
items.quote: Beautiful interface, intuitive flow. Even my parents figured it out on their own.

items.name: Henry Ford
items.quote: Saved me countless trips to physical stores. Absolutely recommend to anyone who shops online.

items.name: Ivy Wilson
items.quote: When I'm not confident about my body, seeing the result on VirtuTry first gives me the courage to buy.

items.name: Jack Brown
items.quote: The AI results often look better than I imagined — it made me brave enough to try styles I'd never pick otherwise.

items.name: Kathy Adams
items.quote: It solves my biggest shopping pain point — what looks good on the model never looks the same on me. Until now.

items.name: Leo Carter
items.quote: For someone who loves experimenting with outfits, this is a treasure. I can try any style risk-free.

items.name: Mia Turner
items.quote: Already recommended it to several friends — everyone loves it. It just works!

companies.title: Powered by Advanced AI
companies.subtitle: Built on cutting-edge generative AI models for ultra-realistic virtual try-on results

aiReady.title: AI-Powered Try-On
aiReady.description: Advanced image generation models accurately render how clothes fit your body — including drape, wrinkles, and lighting.

creem.title: Flexible Credits
creem.description: Pay as you go with credits or subscribe for a monthly allowance. Each try-on costs a fixed amount — no surprises.

auth.title: Secure Accounts
auth.description: Sign up with email or Google one-click login. Photos are encrypted in transit and at rest.

deploy.title: Results in Seconds
deploy.description: Upload your photo and see try-on results in just a few seconds. Anytime, anywhere.

typescript.title: Huge Wardrobe
typescript.description: A constantly growing clothing library across all styles. You can also upload your own garment images to try on.

database.title: Try-On History
database.description: All results are saved automatically. Compare looks side by side to make the best shopping decision.

seo.title: Any Occasion
seo.description: Daily outfits, job interviews, date nights, wedding dresses — preview your look for any scenario.

vibeCoding.title: Always Improving
vibeCoding.description: Our AI models are continuously upgraded for more realistic results. New features ship regularly.

cta.title: Ready to See How Clothes Look on You?
cta.description: Sign up free and get try-on credits. See realistic results in seconds.
